fields.name: EN
fields.description: enable.

fields.name: CACHEINV
fields.description: full cache invalidation Can be set by software, only when EN = 1. Cleared by hardware when the BUSYF flag is set (during full cache invalidation operation). Writing 0 has no effect.

fields.name: CACHECMD
fields.description: cache command maintenance operation (cleans and/or invalidates an address range) Can be set and cleared by software, only when no maintenance command is ongoing (BUSYCMDF = 0). others: reserved.

fields.name: STARTCMD
fields.description: starts maintenance command (maintenance operation defined in CACHECMD). Can be set by software, only when EN = 1, BUSYCMDF = 0, BUSYF = 0 and CACHECMD = 0b001, 0b010 or 0b011. Cleared by hardware when the BUSYCMDF flag is set (during cache maintenance operation). Writing 0 has no effect.

fields.name: RHITMEN
fields.description: read-hit monitor enable.

fields.name: RMISSMEN
fields.description: read-miss monitor enable.

fields.name: RHITMRST
fields.description: read-hit monitor reset.

fields.name: RMISSMRST
fields.description: read-miss monitor reset.

fields.name: WHITMEN
fields.description: write-hit monitor enable.

fields.name: WMISSMEN
fields.description: write-miss monitor enable.

fields.name: WHITMRST
fields.description: write-hit monitor reset.

fields.name: WMISSMRST
fields.description: write-miss monitor reset.

fields.name: HBURST
fields.description: output burst type for cache master port read accesses Write access is always done in INCR burst type.

fields.name: BUSYF
fields.description: full invalidate busy flag.

fields.name: BSYENDF
fields.description: full invalidate busy end flag Cleared by writing DCACHE_FCR.CBSYENDF = 1.

fields.name: ERRF
fields.description: cache error flag Cleared by writing DCACHE_FCR.CERRF = 1.

fields.name: BUSYCMDF
fields.description: command busy flag.

fields.name: CMDENDF
fields.description: command end flag Cleared by writing DCACHE_FCR.CCMDENDF = 1.

fields.name: BSYENDIE
fields.description: interrupt enable on busy end Set by SW to enable an interrupt generation at the end of a cache full invalidate operation.

fields.name: ERRIE
fields.description: interrupt enable on cache error Set by software to enable an interrupt generation in case of cache functional error (eviction or clean operation write-back error).

fields.name: CMDENDIE
fields.description: interrupt enable on command end Set by software to enable an interrupt generation at the end of a cache command (clean and/or invalidate an address range).

fields.name: CBSYENDF
fields.description: clear full invalidate busy end flag Set by software.

fields.name: CERRF
fields.description: clear cache error flag Set by software.

fields.name: CCMDENDF
fields.description: clear command end flag Set by software.

fields.name: RMISSMON
fields.description: cache read-miss monitor counter.

fields.name: WMISSMON
fields.description: cache write-miss monitor counter.

registers.name: CMDRSADDRR
registers.description: DCACHE command range start address register.
registers.fieldset_description: DCACHE command range start address register.

fields.name: CMDSTARTADDR
fields.description: start address of range to which the cache maintenance command specified in DCACHE_CR.CACHECMD field applies This register must be set before DCACHE_CR.CACHECMD is written..

registers.name: CMDREADDRR
registers.description: DCACHE command range end address register.
registers.fieldset_description: DCACHE command range end address register.

fields.name: CMDENDADDR
fields.description: end address of range to which the cache maintenance command specified in DCACHE_CR.CACHECMD field applies This register must be set before DCACHE_CR.CACHECMD is written.
